description_long: This is a wrought iron fence section with a tall, square stone or concrete post at each end, topped with a decorative cap. The fence panel features slender vertical bars, each topped with ornate scrollwork and a continuous decorative motif along the upper rail. The base of the fence is a solid horizontal plinth, likely made of stone or concrete, providing stability and a visual foundation. The ironwork is dark, possibly painted black or dark gray, and the posts and base have a weathered stone appearance. The overall design is elegant and traditional, suitable for urban parks, upscale residential areas, or historic districts. The fence does not include a gate and is intended as a fixed barrier.
description: A decorative wrought iron fence section with ornate scrollwork along the top and sturdy stone or concrete posts at each end. The design is elegant and traditional, with a solid base and no gate.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the square post with a decorative cap and the narrow profile of the fence.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the fence, ornate scrollwork along the top, and both posts with caps.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view highlighting the other post and the narrow edge of the fence.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view showing the decorative top rail, scrollwork, and the solid base connecting both posts.
